name: avisor-native-shell
description: PilotAvisor (AVISOR core) offline shell: IndexedDB flight state + service worker. Wrap with Tauri/Capacitor next.

scripts.plane: npm run vendor:offline && npm run build
scripts.mobile:prep: npm run sync:avisor && npm run vendor:offline && npm run build:navaids && npm run build
scripts.cap:sync: npm run mobile:prep && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:copy: npm run mobile:prep && npx cap copy
scripts.cap:dist: npm run plane && npx cap sync
